mapper.insert: insert into cms_course_info (course_id, teacher_id, course_date, course_period, course_address) values (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{courseDate}, #{coursePeriod}, #{courseAddress})
mapper.update: update cms_course_info set course_id = #{courseId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, course_date = #{courseDate}, course_period = #{coursePeriod}, course_address = #{courseAddress} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from cms_course_info where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select ci.id as info_id, ci.course_id as info_course_id, ci.teacher_id as info_teacher_id, ci.course_date as info_course_date, ci.course_period as info_course_period, ci.course_address as info_course_address,
c.id as c_id, c.course_id as c_course_id, c.course_name as c_course_name, c.credits as c_credit, c.description as c_description,
t.id as t_id, t.teacher_id as t_teacher_id, t.name as t_name, t.gender as t_gender from cms_course_info as ci left join cms_course c on ci.course_id = c.id left join cms_teacher t on ci.teacher_id = t.id
select count(0) as count, c.course_name as name from cms_course_info as ci left join cms_course c on ci.course_id = c.id group by c.id
